key.name: enabled
key.description: Whether the extension should sample pointer movement and react to wiggles.

key.name: effect-mode
key.description: Whether wiggles draw an animated pointer or temporarily increase the real cursor size.

key.name: sensitivity
key.description: How easily pointer movement is classified as a wiggle.

key.name: max-scale
key.description: The largest scale reached by the animated pointer or cursor-size effect.

key.name: growth-speed-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for the grow animation.

key.name: peak-hold-ms
key.description: How long the animated pointer remains at full size after a wiggle settles.

key.name: minimum-visible-ms
key.description: Minimum time in milliseconds that the animated pointer remains visible before it can shrink away.

key.name: shrink-speed-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for the fade and shrink animation.

key.name: pointer-opacity
key.description: Final opacity for the animated pointer.

key.name: hide-system-cursor
key.description: Whether to temporarily hide the real cursor while the animated pointer is visible.

key.name: overlay-opacity
key.description: Compatibility key for older same-session module caches. The current extension does not use it.

key.name: color-mode
key.description: Compatibility key for older same-session module caches. The current extension does not use it.

key.name: custom-color
key.description: Compatibility key for older same-session module caches. The current extension does not use it.

key.name: show-halo
key.description: Compatibility key for older same-session module caches. The current extension does not use it.

key.name: show-pointer
key.description: Compatibility key for older same-session module caches. The current extension does not use it.

key.name: respect-reduced-motion
key.description: Whether to skip smooth animation when desktop animations are disabled.

key.name: sample-interval-ms
key.description: How often pointer position is sampled, in milliseconds.
